name: softwareupdate.failure-reason
title: Status Software Update Failure Reason
description: A status report of a software update failure reason.

payloadkeys.title: The software update failure reason state.
payloadkeys.content: Details about a software update failure.

subkeys.title: The software update failure count.
subkeys.content: The number of times the current software update failed. If there are no failures, or no pending software update, this is `0`.

subkeys.title: The reason for the software update failure.
subkeys.content: If present, this describes the reason for last software update failure. This key isn't present if there are no failures or no pending software update.

subkeys.title: The timestamp of the software update failure.
subkeys.content: If present, this is the RFC 3339 timestamp of the last software update failure. This key isn't present if there are no failures or no pending software update.
